name: ASUS ROG Strix LC II 360 ARGB White Edition All-in-one AIO Liquid CPU Cooler 360mm Radiator, Intel LGA1700, 115x/2066 and AMD AM4/TR4 Support, Triple 120mm 4-pin PWM Addressable RGB Radiator Fans
